A0154.title: Virtual Asset Valuation and Information Disclosure
A0154.definition: Establishing a transparent asset valuation system and mandatory information disclosure mechanism to help users make rational judgments
A0154.description: Information transparency: public disclosure of historical transaction data; project team background disclosure; development roadmap; financial status; risk warnings; third-party ratings; prohibition of false advertising.
A0154.limitation: Valuation standards are difficult to unify; information may be falsified; users may still behave irrationally
keywords: Virtual Asset Valuation and Information Disclosure
